mapper.select:
SELECT A.BGM_ID, A.BGM_NAME, A.ARTIST, A.LYRICS, B.FILE_PATH, C.PRICE FROM BGM A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.IMAGE_FILE_ATTACH_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN BGM_PRICE C ON A.BGM_ID = C.BGM_ID
WHERE A.BGM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
ORDER BY A.BGM_ID DESC
LIMIT #{offset} , 12

SELECT B.BGM_ID, B.BGM_NAME, B.ARTIST, B.LYRICS, C.FILE_PATH, D.PRICE FROM USER_ITEM_INVENTORY A INNER JOIN BGM B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.BGM_ID INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE C ON B.IMAGE_FILE_ATTACH_ID = C.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN BGM_PRICE D ON B.BGM_ID = D.BGM_ID WHERE A.ITEM_TYPE = 'M' GROUP BY B.BGM_ID,B.BGM_NAME,B.ARTIST,C.FILE_PATH ORDER BY COUNT(A.ITEM_ID) DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BGM
WHERE BGM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
SELECT B.FILE_PATH FROM BGM A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.BGM_FILE_ATTACH_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE A.BGM_ID = #{bgmId}

SELECT A.BGM_ID, A.BGM_NAME, A.ARTIST, A.LYRICS, B.FILE_PATH, C.PRICE FROM BGM A INNER JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE B ON A.IMAGE_FILE_ATTACH_ID = B.ATTACH_FILE_ID INNER JOIN BGM_PRICE C ON A.BGM_ID = C.BGM_ID WHERE A.BGM_ID = #{bgmId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BGM ( BGM_LENGTH, BGM_NAME, ARTIST, LYRICS, USE_YN, BGM_FILE_ATTACH_ID, INSERT_USER_ID, INSERT_DT, IMAGE_FILE_ATTACH_ID ) VALUES ( #{bgmLength}, #{bgmName}, #{artist}, #{lyrics}, 'Y', #{bgmFileAttachId}, #{insertUserId}, NOW(), #{imageFileAttachId} )
INSERT INTO BGM_PRICE ( BGM_ID, AVAIL_DAY, PRICE, USE_YN, INSERT_USER_ID, INSERT_DT ) VALUES ( #{bgmId}, #{availDay}, #{price}, 'Y', #{insertUserId}, NOW() )
